examples.text: خِلَالَ القِسْمِ الأَكْبَرِ مِنْ القُرُونِ الوُسْطَى الأُورُوبِيَّة
examples.english: during the most part of European Middle Ages

examples.text: قد تعهد خلال حملته الانتخابيَة بفتح حوار مع ايران
examples.english: During his election campaign, he pledged to open dialogue with Iran.

senses.gloss: toothpick, spit, drill, and other instruments used for picking or perforating

examples.text: مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ يَأْتِيَ يَوْمٌ لَا بَيْعٌ فِيهِ وَلَا خِلَالٌ
examples.english: Before a day arises wherein there will be neither traffic nor friendship.

etymology.text:
Adverbial accusative of the plural of خَلَل (ḵalal, “gap”), i.e. “between the gap of”.

Occupational noun denominal from خَلّ (ḵall, “vinegar”).
